scripts.test:python: python tests/test_client_form.py && python tests/test_html_syntax.py && python tests/test_integrity.py && python tests/test_personalization_core.py && pytest -q tests/test_project_import.py tests/test_project_knowledge.py tests/test_windows_runtime.py
scripts.test:release: npm run test:python && npm run test:browser && npm run test:package && python tests/run_10x_stress.py && python tests/test_release_runtime_flow.py
